$comment: Single source of truth for cross-layer numeric constants. Every value here is referenced by `src/tests/contracts.infra.test.ts` which grep-asserts the value appears in the listed consumer files. Drift between spec/SQL/Zod/migration is now a CI failure, not a Phase-N holistic review finding. See docs/specs/00_engineering_standards.md §11 + the contracts.infra.test.ts header for the consumer mapping rules.
